sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93468" key="sa/feia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σᾰ´φ-εια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, coinage to expl. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σοφία</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4018.tlg001:3:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ascl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.30</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
